summary: Our guests particularly appreciate the authentic Italian cuisine with Neapolitan stone-oven pizza, the attentive and warm service, and the stylish atmosphere. The central location near Königsplatz is regularly highlighted as a plus.

reviews.text: I can´t understand any negative comment about this brilliant restaurant. I had an excellent experience: the restaurant (in a brand new building) is very nicely decorated (this restaurant could be also in London or New York). Very tasteful, modern/clean but with a cozy touch which creates a lovely atmosphere. The service was very friendly and fast, I had the menu on my table the moment I sat down and all orders arrived promptly. Most importantly the food was absolutely delicious! I do travel a lot and therefor I have seen a lot of different restaurants and it has been a while that I got served such great authentic Italian cuisine. The HOMEMADE pasta with truffle was incredible, as well as the pizza bread and the dessert. The food was also very well presented. Fantastic value for money. I can just recommend this restaurant to everyone who wants to enjoy a well cooked Italian lunch or dinner. Also the location is great since it is just few minutes away from the main train station and the most popular night clubs and bars of Munich. It is the perfect place to kick off a great night with friends in Munich!

this Friday night, we made a reservation at Storia restaurant. I would like to remind everyone that it is better to make a reservation in advance, especially on weekends. This time we ordered the beef Tata, sea bass, Ribeye steak, and I also ordered a glass of Spritz cocktail with lemon flavor, although I recommend the orange flavor instead. For dessert, we had a hot chocolate cake and vanilla ice cream. I strongly advise against trying their steak, but their pasta, fish, and appetizers are definitely worth trying. The location of the restaurant is good, the atmosphere is very nice, and there is no mobile phone signal, and the restaurant does not have WiFi. There are many choices of drinks, suitable for relaxing on weekends, with family or for a date. We had to wait for more than half an hour for the dessert, which I think the waiter forgot about, and by the time it arrived, the ice cream had almost melted. Overall, it is a good Italian restaurant near Munich Central Station.

Very welcoming and stylish restaurant with a nice Bistro flair. The service is first rate, and staff is friendly and very well trained. Prices are a little on the higher side but considering the quality of the food, justified. Carpaccio al Tartufo was light, with just the right amount of truffles to not overwhelm the balance of the beef, olive oil and cheese. Pizza Napoletana was one of the best pizzas i ever had. Very thin dough with a light yet crispy crust. Very generous toppings and a beautiful balance of Umami from the Anchovis, Sweetness of the tomatoes with a generous amount of mozzarella and spices. If anything i would love to try this pizza with buffalo mozzarella. The authentic freshly made Tiramisu was a perfect ending for a great meal. If you are in the area give this restaurant a try, you will not be disappointed.

My colleague asked me if I would want pizza for lunch and he told me it was good. Haven’t tasted good Italian Pizza for quite some time and it was really a good idea. Pizza perfectly-made and tasted really, really great. My choice was a vegetarian pizza and the taste was fully justified and I have no words to say but Mi place tanto! I’ve heard other options were also great-tasting. We’ll try the other variants soon! Cheers and keep up the good Italian taste. 👍 Vegetarian options I tend to go for vegeterian or vegan options but I'm not one. I just want to have a feel of how my vege or vegan friends taste. Pizza's here have a variety of options and the first one I got really satisfied.

The food was fantastic. It's very authentic Italian cuisine. Everything my wife and I ordered was great. The gnocchi with mushrooms were my favourite! The atmosphere was perfect and the music was just right. The prices were fair given the quality of food. My only complaint was my server. She was awful and never checked on us. We had to ask other servers for more wine, never asked about the food, didn't offer coffe or dessert. After 35 minutes of waiting i had to ask another server for the bill. The rest of the staff were top notch, we just got the bad one. The place would be a 5 star had it not been for our airhead server. Highly recommended!

We had a lovely time, the food was great, perfectly cooked and on time. But what made it a perfect experience was our waiter, Thomas. We were a large group who needed to pay on separate bills and he handled that very well, being charming and full of energy the entire evening. He was very attentive but without being intrusive. The fish soup was delicious, unexpectedly full of seafood, making it just as consistent as a main course. The fowl in the menu was a very delicious surprise and the pizza crust was perfect. The perfect dining experience!!!

Choose this place for dinner because very near to our hotel but they didn’t disappoint us. Staff was very welcoming and restaurant is stylish. Attentive water and the service is great. Indoor and outdoor seating. Very beautiful & romantic atmosphere on top of that it was sunset time. Prices are little up on the higher side but considering the quality of the food, justified. The authentic Italian food freshly cooked and it’s delicious. If you are in the area and not worried about prices then I recommend give this restaurant a try.

✨ We celebrated a birthday here and had only the best impressions! 🎉 Our table was reserved and beautifully decorated, and the birthday person received a surprise dessert, which was a very sweet and touching gesture. The food was delicious, beautifully served, and the staff were polite and helpful in choosing both meals and drinks. The atmosphere was cozy and warm, and the location is very convenient. Thank you for a wonderful evening – we’ll definitely come back! ❤️

This centrally located restaurant offers a lovely atmosphere with a warm and inviting ambiance. The service was attentive, professional, and made the dining experience enjoyable. While the prices are on the higher side, the quality of the food justified the cost, delivering well-prepared and flavorful dishes. A great choice for a special night out or a refined dining experience

I love this place, come here often. They are very laid back, so if you want something and need to be out of there in under two hours, you need to get their attention. If you are not in a time crunch, slow service is perfect if you like who you went there with! The food is always amazing, the cocktails are always on point and refreshing and excellent selection of wine.
